deals.Description: A Chinese humanoid robot startup developing advanced robotics and AI solutions.
A robotics startup focusing on 'last 500 meters' delivery scenarios with rigid demand.

Beijing-based unicorn providing AI-driven robotics for logistics and supply chain solutions. The company focuses on Customer-centric, AI-driven, Robot-as-a-Service, and Ecosystem-enabling (CARE) strategy.
deals.Investors: N/A (not specified for this round in the source)

deals.Description: Chinese embodied AI firm developing advanced robotics and artificial intelligence solutions. Focuses on training robotics foundation models and scaling data collection infrastructure.
deals.Investors: Tencent Holdings, Alibaba Group, HongShan Capital Group, BlueRun Ventures, Legend Capital, CAS Star, Gaorong Capital, Vision Capital

deals.Description: A trailblazer in AI-driven laboratory automation, developing "lights-out laboratories" that leverage AI for unmanned, closed-loop R&D operations. Focuses on AI4S (AI for Science) infrastructure.
deals.Investors: Beijing New Materials Industry Investment Fund (managed by Shunxi Fund), Fengze Zhiyuan Industry Cultivation Fund of Fengtai District, Beijing

deals.Description: Shanghai-based company providing AI data center power technology. Closed a Series A round to scale R&D and accelerate North America entry.
Shenzhen-based provider of full-stack quantum solutions. Focuses on scaling industrial quantum computing.
deals.Investors: Guotai Junan Innovation Investment, Cornerstone Capital, Sichuan Zhenxing Group

deals.Description: A robotics technology company focused on improving digital capabilities and extending supply chain business.
deals.Investors: SMIC Capital, Houwei Capital, Sequoia China, Guotai Junan Innovation Investment, Hefei Construction Investment Fund, Shanghai Zhiyuan, Boyuan Capital, Jinding Capital, Huayu Transformation and Upgrading Fund (under CRRC Capital)
